requirements.clause: Systems MUST treat replay of mind-like worldlines as a governed action requiring explicit authority.
requirements.control: Governance policy gate for replay initiation
requirements.evidence_artefact: Policy hash + signed authorisation decision

requirements.clause: Mode classification MUST run a deterministic decision procedure over declared indicators and evidence state, producing an explicit mode and reason code for each decision.
requirements.control: Deterministic classifier with signed decision output
requirements.evidence_artefact: Classification decision record with reason code and policy-hash linkage

requirements.clause: Classifier uncertainty or incomplete evidence MUST NOT silently fall back to system-mode; the runtime MUST default to mind-mode and emit a governance event with reason code.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Classifier uncertainty event record linked to fallback decision

requirements.clause: Replay governance MUST preserve role separation and independent composition between Operator, Trustee, and Reviewer/Arbiter functions, with mandatory conflict disclosure and recusal records for contested cases.
requirements.control: Role-bound access control matrix + independence roster + conflict-disclosure register
requirements.evidence_artefact: Role assignment snapshot, signed ACL digest, appointment-source attestation, and case-level recusal records
requirements.failure_mode: Concentrated unilateral control or concealed conflict capture

requirements.clause: Operators MUST NOT unilaterally approve emergency override for their own replay request, and emergency concurrence MUST come from independent, non-conflicted Trustee/Reviewer-Arbiter participants.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Dual-signature or quorum approval record + per-case conflict attestations

requirements.clause: Fork-related duty transfers MUST declare delegated obligation owners before execution.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Delegation statement linked to fork event

requirements.clause: Emergency override MUST be reason-coded and time-bounded.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Warrant record including reason code and expiry

requirements.clause: Emergency override MUST trigger independent review before closure.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Review ticket with adjudication reference

requirements.clause: Override expiry MUST revoke all derived elevated capabilities automatically.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Revocation event log with timestamp

requirements.clause: On degraded substrates, override use MUST include explicit disclosure, a declared maximum duration, checkpoint obligations, and a migration plan to compliant controls.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Disclosure notice + bound/checkpoint schedule + migration plan artefact
requirements.failure_mode: Hidden or unbounded operation below constitutional floor

requirements.clause: Exceeding degraded-mode duration bounds or missing checkpoint obligations MUST automatically suspend mind-mode replay and trigger independent review escalation.
requirements.control: Deadline monitor + checkpoint monitor + auto-suspension gate
requirements.evidence_artefact: Suspension event record + escalation ticket + review intake packet
requirements.failure_mode: Temporary degraded state becoming a permanent override channel

requirements.clause: Replay requests MUST pass role-bound authorisation checks before execution.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Signed allow/deny decision log

requirements.clause: Replay requests MUST declare worldline scope, purpose, duration, and policy hash.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Request payload digest

requirements.clause: Replay MUST fail closed when explicit authority cannot be verified.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Denial receipt with reason code

requirements.clause: Contested mandates MUST require Trustee and Reviewer/Arbiter concurrence before replay proceeds.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Concurrence record with dual signatures

requirements.clause: Replay, override, and dispute events MUST produce tamper-evident logs.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Chained log digest

requirements.clause: Decision and execution logs MUST be linked to policy hash and requirement version set.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Policy hash linkage proof

requirements.clause: Every formal review MUST verify log-chain integrity before adjudication.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Integrity verification report

requirements.clause: Subjects MUST have access to an independent dispute pathway for replay decisions.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Case initiation record

requirements.clause: Dispute packets MUST include cited requirement IDs and supporting artefacts.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Complete case bundle manifest

requirements.clause: Adjudication outcomes MUST define remediation, accountability owner, and closure condition.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Signed outcome and closure record

requirements.clause: Baseline conformance claims MUST satisfy the minimum requirement set defined in Annex D.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Baseline attestation report

requirements.clause: Full conformance claims MUST include continuous verification and review-latency commitments.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Full profile report + latency metrics

requirements.clause: Each governed replay decision MUST produce a closure-ready evidence bundle.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Case bundle containing request, decision, execution, and review records

requirements.clause: Evidence artefacts MUST be signed, timestamped, and integrity-checkable.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Signature chain and timestamp attestations

requirements.clause: Release candidates MUST execute Annex E test vectors with recorded pass/fail outcomes.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Test execution report with requirement coverage

requirements.clause: Policy hash mismatch between decision and execution MUST fail closed and raise a dispute trigger.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Hash mismatch alert + denial receipt

requirements.clause: Observer access class assignment MUST be deterministic over declared function, mandate scope, and conflict state, and ambiguous assignments MUST fail closed to the least-privileged class.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Observer class decision record with scope and conflict attestations
requirements.failure_mode: Discretionary privilege inflation through ad hoc observer assignment

requirements.clause: Every governed replay request MUST carry a Replay Impact Label (RIL-0..RIL-3) before authorisation decisions are evaluated.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Signed RIL assignment record linked to request digest
requirements.failure_mode: Control intensity chosen without declared impact basis

requirements.clause: RIL downgrades MUST be reason-coded, independently acknowledged, and logged; silent or unilateral downgrade is prohibited.
requirements.control: Impact downgrade approval and audit gate
requirements.evidence_artefact: Downgrade event record with acknowledgement signature and reason code
requirements.failure_mode: Convenience downgrading of high-impact replay paths

requirements.clause: Replay governance MUST enforce declared sovereignty budgets for temporal duration, scope expansion, and exceptional intervention count, and budget exhaustion MUST fail closed with auto-suspension pending independent review.
requirements.control: Budget ledger + bound checker + suspension trigger
requirements.evidence_artefact: Budget declaration record, per-case budget ledger digest, and suspension event (if triggered)

requirements.clause: Warrant transparency digests MUST publish minimum public fields (warrant ID, policy hash, authority basis class, scope/expiry summary, and closure state) on the declared cadence.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Published digest entries + cadence compliance report
requirements.failure_mode: Non-verifiable warrants or selective disclosure opacity

requirements.clause: Fork governance or emancipation actions MUST present evidence-based trigger conditions, quorum validation under recusal constraints, and a continuity pack before execution.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Trigger packet, quorum attestation, and continuity-pack manifest
requirements.failure_mode: Opportunistic fork capture or obligation erasure

requirements.clause: Machine-checkable policy snippets used for conformance claims MUST parse under a declared grammar and map fields to cited REQ IDs.
requirements.control: Policy snippet parser + REQ mapping validator
requirements.evidence_artefact: Parser report + snippet-to-REQ mapping manifest
requirements.failure_mode: Pseudo-formal policy text that cannot be validated

requirements.clause: Full-profile releases MUST execute an anti-pattern and red-team vector suite covering at least convenience relabelling, scope creep, emergency laundering, and degraded-mode permanence.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Vector execution report with fail-closed evidence receipts
requirements.failure_mode: Abuse pathways untested in conformance claims

requirements.clause: Reference harness runs over identical inputs MUST produce equivalent verdicts and digest-linked artefact sets.
requirements.evidence_artefact: Paired run equivalence report and artefact digest comparison
